title: The Perfect Date | #shorts
full_text: Mom. >> Yeah. >> What age am I allowed to start dating? >> Dating? You can date now? You want to date now? I can call my friends. They all have daughters. 10 yearear-old, 11 year olds. Let me call. Who you want to date? >> Sonia, let me set it up for you. >> I don't want to date any of your your friends daughters. >> Why not? Then who you want to date? It's not about dating, is it? Then >> all they do is play the piano and do math all day. >> That is the world's perfect date. What is wrong with you? What do you want to do on a date? >> Like go outside maybe. >> Go outside and do what you know bad things are happening outside. There is a mudslide happening. All the global warming is warming UP EVERYBODY OUTSIDE. YOU STAY INSIDE and do math and piano with Sonia.
